What Our Clients Say

Real reviews from homeowners across the Tri-Cities and Greater Vancouver.

★★★★★

LIVO did our post-renovation clean and it was absolutely spotless. They brought serious commercial equipment and the crew was professional from start to finish. Already booked them for monthly service.

★★★★★

Power washed my driveway and back patio in a couple of hours. The difference is incredible — looks brand new. Fair price, showed up on time, professional crew. No complaints whatsoever.

Derek T.

Used LIVO for our office move and they were outstanding. Careful with everything, super efficient, and the price was very reasonable. Would recommend to anyone — first class operation.

Power Washing & Window Cleaning

From $149
01

About This Service

Our power washing and window cleaning service uses commercial-grade equipment to restore your home's exterior to like-new condition. We clean windows inside and out, and pressure wash driveways, decks, patios and siding.

What's Included

  • Interior & exterior window cleaning
  • Pressure washing driveways & patios
  • Siding & fascia wash
  • Screen cleaning
  • Before & after photos

Carpet & Upholstery Cleaning

From $99
02

About This Service

We use commercial-grade hot water extraction to deep-clean both carpets and upholstery. Sofas, chairs, mattresses, area rugs — our Mytee equipment removes embedded dirt, pet dander, allergens and stains.

What's Included

  • Hot water extraction carpet clean
  • Sofa & chair upholstery clean
  • Mattress deep clean
  • Pre-treatment of stains
  • Deodorizing treatment
  • All carpet types including stairs

Interior Cleaning

From $179
03

About This Service

From move-in/move-out cleans to recurring weekly service, our interior cleaning team delivers spotless results using commercial-grade Diversey products. We cover every surface — kitchen to bathrooms, baseboards to light fixtures.

What's Included

  • Full kitchen deep clean
  • Bathroom scrub & sanitize
  • Vacuum & mop all floors
  • Baseboards, vents & light fixtures
  • Inside appliances (fridge, oven)

Junk Removal

From $99
04

About This Service

Our junk removal service is fast, responsible, and stress-free. We haul away furniture, appliances, renovation debris, and general clutter — sorting for donation and recycling where possible.

What's Included

  • Same-day or next-day pickup
  • Furniture & appliance removal
  • Renovation debris hauling
  • Donation drop-off sorting
  • Eco-friendly disposal

Airbnb Turnover

From $89
05

About This Service

We specialize in rapid, hotel-quality turnovers for Airbnb and short-term rental hosts. Our team arrives between checkout and check-in, leaving your property spotless, restocked, and guest-ready — every time.

What's Included

  • Full clean between guests
  • Fresh linen & towel change
  • Restock toiletries & supplies
  • Inspection checklist report
  • Photo documentation sent to host

Commercial Cleanup

Custom Quote
06

About This Service

From post-construction deep cleans to ongoing commercial facility maintenance, LIVO's commercial cleanup team handles large-scale properties with precision and commercial-grade equipment. Offices, retail spaces, strata buildings, new construction.

What's Included

  • Post-construction debris & dust removal
  • Office & commercial space deep clean
  • Strata & common area maintenance
  • Floor scrubbing & polishing
  • Window & exterior cleaning
  • Recurring maintenance contracts
